        Projects
        

      

      

        

          

          

            
PiClaw

            
OpenClaw for everyday people.

            
Runs on any hardware with only 32MB RAM. Deploys in 1–2 minutes. Built after seeing how hard OpenClaw was for non-technical users — starting with my mom.

            
click to explore →

          

        

        

          

          

            
Juno

            
AI Real Estate Cold Caller.

            
Automated cold calling for real estate — helping realtors gather feedback on listings at scale. Scaled outreach to 100+ leads across 10+ realtor teams.

            
click to explore →

          

        

        

          

          

            
Readee

            
Interview answers in YOUR story.

            
AI interview coach that answers questions using your personal data from Google Sheets. Helping TKS students land internships — connected with CMO @ Cluely at launch.

            
click to explore →

          

        

        

          

          

            
Domi AI

            
AI Technical Stock Analyst.

            
Analyzes stocks for technical traders using n8n, Telegram, and OpenAI APIs. Achieved a 25% annual return rate and built a global community of day traders.

            
click to explore →
